author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text: #libdweb enables experimental p2p APIs for web extensions in #Firefox.  This video demonstrates how #JS #IPFS can take advantage of them to  discover and talk to other IPFS nodes on the local network! https://youtu.be/LDHFqwC8Syg #MDNS #TCP
content.html: #libdweb enables experimental p2p APIs for web extensions in #Firefox. This video demonstrates how #JS #IPFS can take advantage of them to discover and talk to other IPFS nodes on the local network! https://youtu.be/LDHFqwC8Syg #MDNS #TCP
